title: Mizoram PSC Veterinary Assistant Surgeon Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
shortInfo: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) Veterinary Assistant Surgeon Notification 2026 has been released on 8 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Mizoram PSC Veterinary Assistant Surgeon Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 21 to 35 years who have a Bachelor of Veterinary Science & Animal Husbandry Degree are eligible to apply for this Veterinary Assistant Surgeon vacancy. The online application process for Mizoram PSC Veterinary Assistant Surgeon Recruitment 2026 has started on 8 May 2026 and will remain open until 19 June 2026. C

basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Veterinary Assistant Surgeon Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) Veterinary Assistant Surgeon Notification 2026 has been released on 8 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Mizoram PSC Veterinary Assistant Surgeon Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 21 to 35 years who have a Bachelor of Veterinary Science & Animal Husbandry Degree are eligible to apply for this Veterinary Assistant Surgeon vacancy. The online application process for Mizoram PSC Veterinary Assistant Surgeon Recruitment 2026 has started on 8 May 2026 and will remain open until 19 June 2026. C

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Upper age limit relaxable up to 5 years for ST/SC candidates. Age Limit as on 01-01-2026.

qualification.details: Bachelor of Veterinary Science & Animal Husbandry Degree from a recognised University. Valid Registration under the Veterinary Council of India OR Mizoram State Veterinary Council. Computer Proficiency as prescribed by the Mizoram Group ‘A’, ‘B’ and ‘C’ posts Service/Recruitment (Amendment) Rules, 2023. Mizo Language Proficiency.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mizoram PSC VAS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Veterinary Assistant Surgeon (VAS) post is 19th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the VAS post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years as of 1st January 2026. Age relaxation is provided for certain categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Veterinary Assistant Surgeon post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor of Veterinary Science & Animal Husbandry Degree from a recognized university, along with valid registration and computer and Mizo language proficiency.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Veterinary Assistant Surgeon post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Veterinary Assistant Surgeon (VAS) position announced in this recruitment drive by the Mizoram Public Service Commission.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the Mizoram PSC VAS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the notification, there is no application fee for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) candidates. Other categories' fee details should be checked in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Veterinary Assistant Surgeon post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be appointed at Level-10 in the Pay Matrix, which indicates a competitive salary as per the government pay scales.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Veterinary Assistant Surgeon (VAS) post will be based on a Direct Recruitment Examination conducted by the Mizoram Public Service Commission.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, the upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years for candidates belonging to Scheduled Tribe (ST) and Scheduled Caste (SC) categories.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the Mizoram PSC VAS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of Mizoram PSC or via the direct application link provided in the 'Important Links' section before the closing date.
